star_1.text: game is fun, but adds are a deal breaker. I can see if you actually win real money. but it no money game. after each turn, and add. sometimes it makes you watch 2 adds. you want to keep players playing, limit your adds to 1 add after every 4th or 5th turn.

it was probably a good game at one time but the ads are atrocious... after every race, pop ups while upgrading... then when I "watch AN (as in 1) ad" to double my reward it turns into 3 separate ads and then doesn't give me the bonus afterwards.

Like most games, it gives you an option to watch a 30 second ad to receive extra coin bonus or buy extra character clothing item. ONLY problem is that after you finish watching the ad, NOTHING is awarded. You need to watch the ad multiple times for it to work! Seems like another one of these bombard you with ads after 10 seconds of play type of game.
it doesn't have epic level and it lags so much I kinda like it but it is 10/2

The races are extremely short, easy and boring, and after every race you will get an ad. If you want to get a new skin or dance, you will have to watch an ad. If you want to open a chest, you need to watch and ad. On this game, 75% of the time you will be watching ads. The game isn't even fun anyway. I would've rated this game zero stars, but I can't. Unless you really enjoy watching ads, DO NOT get this game.
It's stuck at one of the levels, not moving ahead, tried closing the app, updating but there seems to be some bug, please fix it..
it was doing just great and then BAM it stops making any progress. I have video and photo. not sure to upload it since it wont let me.

Not sure what it is with Azur and their games of this style but they're all glitchy this one freezes and when I tried doing level 142 it freezes at the second obstacle and I couldn't go any further so it's the second race 3D parkour type game from this company

After my first less than 30 seconds of gameplay I already had a ad. No thanks if I am going to watch more ads then playing games and have fun while they're getting richer off of the ads . Don't waste your time if you want to keep watching ads every time. Let's really in one hour. You probably watch 90% ads and 10% playing time. That's a waste of your time. There's other games out there with no ads. If they were smart, they do least 5 minutes at a time at least. Have some fun time

I really don't like this game. I don't recommend. 1: Ads. If I say "no thanks" so I don't want an ad, I get an ad. Everytime you finish a race: *ad.* 2: Players. They all look like bots. Why are they faster? It isn't fair. Once you get up top they are suddenly on top with you? Huh? 3: Levels. They are the same color scheme, making it boring. The animations are really choppy. They soon start to repeat itself. 4: Characters. They are only boy superhero skins, and plain color skins. Unoriginal!

It's slow, it's dumb, it's boring. Too many ads. There is no description for the gameplay. Graphics are okay but at the same time they look like they're prototypes. The touches don't work sometimes. And most important of all, i have no idea what to do in the boss/bonus levels or whatever they're called. Like said, it'd be better if there were tipps, descriptions or tutorials. Overall a huge letdown.

Something needs to be done....the game is a huge cheat. The opponents run way faster than my avatar and they seem to be able to run right through without hitting anything. I've also had it happen that I was crossing a bridge that opens and saw the opponent fall and was underneath it then all of a sudden they were at the finish line before me even though I didn't fall at all. Major glitches are making this game stressful instead of challenging and fun! Only a star because I had to to post!

It's a great game, but the ads super annoying. It freezes on me often and glitches. I get lots of ads but when attempting to get a character I have to click no thanks because the ads don't work? If they fix those it would be 5 stars. It's also way to easy for some players if you add a hard mode it would be way better. PLS FIX THIS !!!!

Seemed nice at first, but there are too many ads. While I was busy playing a message popped up that said I have now subscribed to some services and I will pay an amount daily. I did unsubscribe and deleted the game also because the same happened to one of my friends and her airtime kept disappearing. She later found out she was also subscribed to soms service that she didn't subscribe to. It also occured shortly after installing and playing this game.
horribe game. ads every 3 second. not exaggerating.

An absolute mess. It's so ridiculously easy! One time I literally just held the screen and won anyway. No stradegy, no thinking, no nothing. And I know ads = money, BUT THIS IS OUTRAGEOUS! NO APP SHOULD HAVE AN ADD ALMOST EVERY LEVEL! And the AI is straight garbage! I literally gave them a 10 second head start, AND STILL WON!! And I got 0 thrills out of this game! I do NOT recommend this 'game'!

First thing that's bad about it was the ads. The are way to many ads to watch and when u try to get a skin, it makes u watch more ads. Second all you do is just tap the screen and run and that's pretty much it. Third it gets boring because it's to easy. Wouldn't recommend getting this game. But if you're really young then it MIGHT be something fun for you to get :-):-)
just another platform to advertise fake games do not bother playing this game unless you want to spend your life watching pointless fake adds
I wish i could have rated it one star, so bad it's just too repetitive. are these games tuff with these ads bro🥀

First of all it is way too easy and the courses are super short, second, in the chest room you have to watch a video to even get a key, third, the angles of how you can see the person is really weird so somtimes you cant see if you got past the obstical so you die, finally, all you do is hold down on the screen so it gets boring super fast, i do not recomend this game.

star_2.text: This game looked fun in the ad. The game COULD be fun, but the characters do not jump when you push it to-I have do it at least 3 times before it works. Beyond that, even though an item says '$375', you can't actually buy it, you have to watch an ad. Also, if you say No Thanks, it plays the ad anyway. Aggravating, because there are ads after each level anyway, so given the choice, I say no. Plays it anyway and then I still don't get the reward. Uninstalling. Don't waste your time.

After a few "seasons" you stop being able to change your character to any interesting ones. The ones that are selected are lame. The ones you are supposed to use points to upgrade to remain locked. Also as you progress, it starts adding more and more ads. You run a 10 second race and have to deal with a 30 second ad regardless of whether you win or not. Too bad because this is pretty fun. Bye.
the concept is great. the came is horrible. no competition. ads after every single play.

Can't even try the game out without getting bombarded with REALLY long ads. Looks like it could have been fun but I didn't have the time or patience. I might have paid the no ad fee but wanted to try it out first. Devs, you might want to shorten the ad time initially just to give the user time to try it out. Un-installed it after 5-10 min

I like the game and all, but I have three problems here. First, the ads. There's way too many ads in the app. After every race, ad. If you would like a dance, ad. To open a chest? Yes, ad. Second, the wierd death animations. I hate it so much, that it's kind of disturbing. Lastly, the skins. There is just no skins that you can get for coins that are female. It's pretty frustrating for a girl, to be honest. Fix all of the things that annoy me, and we're fine.

The game is fun and could be a great way to pass the time. But im annoyed because they give the option to watch an ad to collect a reward or you can push no thanks. Well i try to choose to watch the ad and it wont allow me to watch and get the reward. So i HAVE to push no thanks. But then...i am forced to watch an ad 50% of the time anyway and im left with no reward!

Turn off your mobile data, there's an ad between every level. You'll love the game... until lvl 22, when the levels repeat. Yes, you read that right, only 21 unique levels and the rest are duplicates. Honestly, it's really not worth getting into it, cuz you'll only be disappointed.

it's was just kind of laging and was just not that fun and maybe other enjoy it for it is just ok and so it is a good games l just a did not unuistall because of this before playing this is just my opinion

To me every game on a cell phone is a waste of time because you're going to play more ads than you are going to play the game.. To me the people who create games on cell phones are nothing but scam artists because the more you watch the ads the more richer they become. I get having 1 but not ever time you click to play.!! Waste of space.

1rst. of all, when you are finishing more levels then the levels get hard to complete them 2nd. the game cheats by putting you in third place at the start of the race so you can loose. And 3rd, the game is boring after a while when you try to finish the level and you can't finish the level cause it's too hard😞so anyway i unstalled this app cause the game is too laggy, boring, and it's cheating by putting you last place. 🔻🔻🔻

This game is ok but deffenetly not five stars and the reason i rate it only 2 stars is because there is so many ads, and I mean there is ALOT of ads you cant do anything without getting an ad. To go on a new level, ad, to get a new skin, ad, to get a new dance, ad! Why so many ads!!!!!!

Well thsi game is pretty okay I mean dont get me wrong its fun! Overall its an okay game, it certainly isnt the best out there but there is worse than this Its fine not great just fine.

This game is not at all like they advertise it. The skins are horrible! And they have so many glitches. For example, I won first place and got eliminated on several occasions. The obstacles are the same ones over and over again, there's nothing new. I'm at level 150 and there is nothing new. I just play this game to pass time. Overall, it's not worth it.

this game is good but there is a lot of ads in it and I wish that there will not be any types of it be so it should be some sort of girly types👙

Frustrating. Each time I get to the epic level I have to go to the chest first. It appears to have got stuck on one character box (which I already claimed) and has stayed on this for at least a hundred levels. The actual tasks are on a loop so after 750+ trials the tasks have become very easy to pass. Although it implies their are 12 special characters it won't let me open the 2nd set of 6 as I "need more levels"!! How many levels is enough?

Not five stars at all. Three stars is the highest i'll give it. This is because when you reach lvl twenty-four, it starts glitching REALLY bad. Like, way TOO bad. When it flings you up between the smashing blocks, it won't let you move up ONTO the flingy things, and this means you can't even make it THROUGH the block things. And this is just one of the annoying glitches it starts to develop. Please fix these annoying glitches and i'll give it four stars. Another problem is the ads. WAY to much.
